title: A Game Designer in Beijing Bought Toy Guns. China Imprisoned Him.
content: San Cheng bought toy guns online as props for video game design. Then the police arrived, and he was jailed under China’s strict but messy gun laws.

more_info.byline: By Chris Buckley and Raymond Zhong

en_title: A Game Designer in Beijing Bought Toy Guns. China Imprisoned Him.
en_content: San Cheng bought toy guns online as props for video game design. Then the police arrived, and he was jailed under China’s strict but messy gun laws.

title: Those Cute Cats Online? They Help Spread Misinformation.
content: A mainstay of the internet is regularly used to build audiences for people and organizations pushing false and misleading information.

title: How to Carry Your Covid Health Data on a Smartphone
content: To plan for safe travels and gatherings this holiday season, here are some simple ways to take your Covid-related health data with you.

title: Prosecutors Push Elizabeth Holmes of Theranos to Take Responsibility
content: Under cross-examination, the founder of the failed blood testing start-up defended herself but admitted that she had made mistakes.

title: Venture Capital Funding for Crypto Companies Is Surging
content: It has risen more than in any other year, partly driven by the investing arms of large firms already in the crypto industry.

title: CNN Suspends Chris Cuomo After New Details on Help He Gave His Brother

title: Dorsey’s Twitter Departure Hints at Tech Moguls’ Restlessness
content: Jack Dorsey, who is stepping down after six years as Twitter’s chief executive, is one of the tech leaders who seem to have grown tired of managing their empires.

en_content: Jack Dorsey, who is stepping down after six years as Twitter’s chief executive, is one of the tech leaders who seem to have grown tired of managing their empires.

title: A Top Official Says the Fed Will ‘Grapple’ With Faster Bond-Buying Taper

title: The global economic recovery has been fast but uneven, a new report shows.
content: The organization predicted the global economy would grow 5.6 percent this year, but said a new virus-related downturn would hurt the United States and Europe differently.

title: Merck’s Covid Treatment Pill Wins Blessing of F.D.A. Panel
content: The treatment, known as molnupiravir, could be authorized in the United States within days, and available within weeks, if the F.D.A. follows the committee’s recommendation.

title: A federal judge blocks Biden’s vaccine mandate for U.S. health workers.
content: The ruling is a setback for the administration’s effort to require vaccination for hospital and nursing home workers, which had been set to start next week.

title: The U.S. gave $3.7 billion in relief to likely ineligible businesses, auditor finds.
content: The Small Business Administration skipped a basic fraud check and sent billions to recipients barred from receiving federal funds, the agency’s inspector general reported.

des_facet: Coronavirus Aid, Relief, and Economic Security Act (2020)

en_title: The U.S. gave $3.7 billion in relief to likely ineligible businesses, auditor finds.

title: South African Company Nears License to Sell J. & J. Covid Shot Across Africa
content: The new agreement makes Aspen Pharmacare the first African company to market a Covid vaccine on the continent. But it stops short of allowing Aspen to make the ingredients in the vaccine.
en_title: South African Company Nears License to Sell J. & J. Covid Shot Across Africa
en_content: The new agreement makes Aspen Pharmacare the first African company to market a Covid vaccine on the continent. But it stops short of allowing Aspen to make the ingredients in the vaccine.

title: Weak Recovery Leaves India’s Middle Class Anxious and Frugal
content: Covid-19 essentially robbed the country of more than a year of badly needed economic growth. That’s lost ground that cannot be regained quickly.
